```{r echo=FALSE}
runtimes <- c()
knitr::knit_hooks$set(time_it=local({
    now <- NULL
    \(before, options) {
        if (before) {
            now <<- Sys.time()
        } else {
            res <- difftime(Sys.time(), now)
            runtimes <<- c(runtimes, res)
        }
    }
}))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(time_it=TRUE)
# source: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown-cookbook/time-chunk.html
```
